subcodes.first_line: O Mashhadi Muhammad! The deniers claim that the people of Bahá slay men. Say: Nay, by God, the Lord of Judgment, by His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مشهدی محمد معرضین میگویند اهل بها آدم میکشند قل لا والله حضرت دیان بامر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @contention and conflict, @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant
